description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”), operating in autonomous mode, was traveling from southbound Steiner Street to southbound 
Sanchez Street via eastbound Duboce Avenue when a skateboarder traveling through the stop sign on eastbound Duboce made contact with 
the rear passenger door of the Cruise AV. The skateboarder left the scene without exchanging information. There were no injuries and 
police were not called.
Go to Page 3
